text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
After hearing about a trendy cafe, I<n>decide to
check it out for myself...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Jinkies! So this is the spiffy city cafe<n>I've been
hear'n about!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, never been before, but it<n>doesn't look half
bad. Seems pretty<n>empty... Uh, Yukino?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Okay... Carrot mou...mousse! Carrot<n>mousse
frappuccino!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Just say it right, 'n nobody'll laugh or<n>yell at you!
Nothing ventured, nothing<n>gained!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...I'll go first.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me. Do you have anything<n>that's low in
sugar? Oh, and make it a<n>small.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Also, I'll take one of those... banana<n>bread
things. With a bit of cream on<n>top, please.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Golly gee! She orders way different<n>from what I
read online and in those<n>magazines! It's so...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Cool!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: I-I see. I think I get it. As long I keepmy cool, I'll be cool!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Okay, I'm gonna do it too...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me! One carrot thing, please!<n>With lots of
cream!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: City! Thanks for tagg'n along with<n>me!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: No worries. I wanted to come<n>anyways.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
By the way, why didn't you choose<n>the carrot
thing?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
It has too many calo—I mean, I just<n>didn't feel
like it today. Maybe next<n>time.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Whoa... Just doing your own thing,<n>huh.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
I guess a real city girl doesn't feel the<n>need to
follow the latest fads.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Heh. You downed that drink pretty<n>fast, though.
Was it really that good?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! There were some carrots<n>mixed into the
cream! And the<n>frappuccino had...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
They both take turns giving their<n>thoughts on
their orders. It seems like<n>they're having a
wonderful time<n>together.
